mapper.select: SELECT tptwd.*, tdecd.evaluation_id, ter.evaluation_dt, ter.evaluation_target, d.view_path as func_path, c.doc_type as send_doc_type, c.link_div, c.menu_id, d.menu_nm FROM esg.tb_evaluation_report_detail tptwd left JOIN esg.tb_evaluation_report_checklist terc on terc.evaluation_id = tptwd.evaluation_id and terc.comp_id = #{compId} LEFT JOIN esg.tb_evaluation_report_checklist_detail tdecd ON tdecd.evaluation_item_id = tptwd.evaluation_item_id AND tptwd.evaluation_id = tdecd.evaluation_id and terc.comp_id = tdecd.comp_id AND terc.evaluation_id = tdecd.evaluation_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_evaluation_report ter ON ter.write_year = tptwd.write_year AND ter.doc_type = tptwd.doc_type AND ter.doc_no = tptwd.doc_no LEFT JOIN dataset.tb_dataset_evaluation_checklist_detail b ON tptwd.evaluation_id = b.evaluation_id AND tptwd.evaluation_item_id = b.evaluation_item_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_menu_doctype c ON b.hse_doc_type = c.doc_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_menu d on c.menu_id = d.menu_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND tptwd.write_year = #{writeYear} AND tptwd.doc_type = #{docType} AND tptwd.doc_no = #{docNo} ORDER BY terc.ord_seq, tptwd.use_yn DESC, tptwd.doc_seq ASC

SELECT tptwd.*, tdecd.evaluation_id, ter.evaluation_dt, ter.evaluation_target, d.view_path as func_path, c.doc_type as send_doc_type, c.link_div, c.menu_id, d.menu_nm FROM esg.tb_evaluation_report_detail tptwd LEFT JOIN esg.tb_evaluation_report_checklist_detail tdecd ON tdecd.evaluation_item_id = tptwd.evaluation_item_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_evaluation_report ter ON ter.write_year = tptwd.write_year AND ter.doc_type = tptwd.doc_type AND ter.doc_no = tptwd.doc_no LEFT JOIN dataset.tb_dataset_evaluation_checklist_detail b ON tptwd.evaluation_id = b.evaluation_id AND tptwd.evaluation_item_id = b.evaluation_item_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_menu_doctype c ON b.hse_doc_type = c.doc_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_menu d on c.menu_id = d.menu_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND tptwd.write_year = #{writeYear} AND tptwd.doc_type = #{docType} AND tptwd.doc_no = #{docNo} AND tptwd.doc_seq =#{docSeq} ORDER BY tptwd.doc_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_evaluation_report WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_evaluation_report ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, evaluation_dt, evaluation_target, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{evaluationDt}, #{evaluationTarget}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_evaluation_report_detail WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_evaluation_report_detail ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, evaluation_id, evaluation_item_id, evaluation_nm, evaluation_item_nm, evaluation_criteria, evaluation_method, use_yn, result_yn, achievement_rate, contents, remark, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{evaluationId}, #{evaluationItemId}, #{evaluationNm}, #{evaluationItemNm}, #{evaluationCriteria}, #{evaluationMethod}, #{useYn}, #{resultYn}, #{achievementRate}, #{contents}, #{remark}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_evaluation_report_checklist WHERE 1 = 1 AND comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY ord_seq
SELECT * FROM dataset.tb_dataset_evaluation_checklist WHERE 1 = 1 AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY ord_seq
SELECT * FROM esg.tb_evaluation_report_checklist WHERE 1 = 1 AND comp_id = #{compId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY ord_seq

SELECT a.evaluation_nm, b.* from esg.tb_evaluation_report_checklist a left join esg.tb_evaluation_report_checklist_detail b ON a.comp_id = b.comp_id AND a.evaluation_id = b.evaluation_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.comp_id = #{compId} AND a.evaluation_id = #{evaluationId} ORDER BY a.ord_seq

SELECT a.evaluation_nm, b.* from dataset.tb_dataset_evaluation_checklist a left join dataset.tb_dataset_evaluation_checklist_detail b ON a.evaluation_id = b.evaluation_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND b.evaluation_id = #{evaluationId} AND b.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY a.ord_seq

SELECT a.evaluation_id, a.evaluation_nm, b.* from esg.tb_evaluation_report_checklist a left join esg.tb_evaluation_report_checklist_detail b ON a.comp_id = b.comp_id AND a.evaluation_id = b.evaluation_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.comp_id = #{compId} AND a.evaluation_id = #{searchText} AND b.evaluation_item_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY a.ord_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN #{evaluationId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NOT NULL AND #{evaluationId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} != '' then #{evaluationId} ELSE TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(evaluation_id, 9, 4)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0') END AS evaluation_id FROM esg.tb_evaluation_report_checklist WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND evaluation_id like to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || '%'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_evaluation_report_checklist ( comp_id, evaluation_id, evaluation_nm, use_yn, created_at, created_by, ord_seq ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{evaluationId}, #{evaluationNm}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{ordSeq} )

SELECT CASE WHEN #{evaluationItemId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NOT NULL AND #{evaluationItemId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} != '' then #{evaluationItemId} ELSE TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(evaluation_item_id, 9, 4)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0') END AS evaluation_item_id FROM esg.tb_evaluation_report_checklist_detail WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND evaluation_item_id like to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || '%'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_evaluation_report_checklist_detail ( comp_id, evaluation_id, evaluation_item_id, evaluation_item_nm, use_yn, created_at, created_by, ord_seq ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{evaluationId}, #{evaluationItemId}, #{evaluationItemNm}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{ordSeq} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dataset.tb_evaluation_report_checklist WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY ord_seq
SELECT * FROM dataset.tb_dataset_evaluation_checklist_detail WHERE 1 = 1 AND evaluation_id = #{evaluationId} ORDER BY ord_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_legal_comlpliance_evaluation WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_legal_comlpliance_evaluation ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, legal_evaluation_dt, legal_evaluation_nm, use_yn, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{legalEvaluationDt}, #{legalEvaluationNm}, #{useYn}, #{createdBy} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_legal_comlpliance_evaluation_detail WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_legal_comlpliance_evaluation_detail ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, review_doc_type, review_doc_no, review_doc_seq, review_write_year, legal_review_yn, contents, remark, use_yn, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{reviewDocType}, #{reviewDocNo}, #{reviewDocSeq}, #{reviewWriteYear}, #{legalReviewYn}, #{contents}, #{remark}, #{useYn}, #{createdBy} )

INSERT INTO esg.tb_legal_comlpliance_evaluation_detail_orgn ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, orgn_id, orgn_nm, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{orgnId}, #{orgnNm}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT evaluation_id , evaluation_item_id , criteria_id , criteria as evaluationCriteria , methods as evaluationMethod , use_yn , ord_seq FROM dataset.tb_dataset_evaluation_checklist_criteria WHERE evaluation_id = #{evaluationId} AND evaluation_item_id = #{evaluationItemId}
